description_long: This is a classic rural-style mailbox mounted on a sturdy wooden post. The mailbox itself is a rounded, rectangular metal container painted black, with a curved top and a flat bottom. A bright red flag is attached to the side, used to signal outgoing mail. The wooden post is weathered, showing natural wood grain and some discoloration, and is constructed with a vertical support and a diagonal brace for stability. The mailbox has a front-hinged door, which is the main access point for retrieving mail. There are no visible identification markings or numbers on the mailbox.
description: A black, rounded metal mailbox with a red flag, mounted on a weathered wooden post with a diagonal brace.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black mailbox, the red flag, and the wooden post with its diagonal support.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view showing the mailbox's curved end and the thickness of the wooden post.
description_view_2: Opposite side view of the mailbox, showing the other side of the black metal body and the red flag.
description_view_3: Rear end-on view showing the back of the mailbox and the wooden post directly behind it.
